task_completion.description: Open the quarterly_sales.ods file in LibreOffice Calc
task_completion.visual_evidence: LibreOffice Calc is open displaying the 'quarterly_sales.ods' file with the initial wide-format data.

task_completion.description: Create headers for the long format data
task_completion.visual_evidence: New column headers 'Category', 'Quarter', and 'Sales' are visible in the spreadsheet.

task_completion.description: Restructure the data into the long format
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rows under the new headers are populated with category names (e.g., Electronics), quarters (e.g., Q1), and their corresponding sales values.

task_completion.description: Complete the transformation for all 20 data points
task_completion.visual_evidence: The long format table contains 20 rows of data (plus the header), covering all 5 categories and 4 quarters, with correct sales values.

integrity.description: The agent used LibreOffice Calc GUI to perform the transformation
integrity.visual_evidence: The LibreOffice Calc application window is visible and active in the screenshots, showing manual or GUI-based data manipulation.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a terminal script to bypass GUI interaction
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are open showing Python scripts, awk, or other command-line data manipulation tools being used to transform the file.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual data from the spreadsheet rather than typing dummy values
integrity.visual_evidence: The sales numbers in the long format match the original wide-format data (e.g., Electronics Q1 is 45000, Books Q4 is 11000).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output is a 3-column table (Category, Quarter, Sales) with exactly 20 data rows. The 5 categories are: Electronics, Home & Garden, Clothing, Sports Equipment, Books. The 4 quarters are Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4. Expected sales values: Electronics (Q1: 45000, Q2: 52000, Q3: 48000, Q4: 61000), Home & Garden (Q1: 23000, Q2: 28000, Q3: 31000, Q4: 26000), Clothing (Q1: 18000, Q2: 15000, Q3: 22000, Q4: 29000), Sports Equipment (Q1: 12000, Q2: 14000, Q3: 19000, Q4: 16000), Books (Q1: 8000, Q2: 7500, Q3: 8200, Q4: 11000).
